children.heading: Eligible area
children.label: 1 Eligible area
children.text: The term “eligible area” means a metropolitan area meeting the requirements of that are applicable to the area.section 300ff–11 of this title

children.heading: Metropolitan area
children.label: 2 Metropolitan area
children.text: The term “metropolitan area” means an area that is referred to in the HIV/AIDS Surveillance Report of the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention as a metropolitan area, and that has a population of 50,000 or more individuals.
